name: Workflow 2 – P2P Report: Webhook → Groq → Response

nodes.name: Webhook – Receive Report Request
nodes.notes:
FastAPI POSTs the full run payload here (synchronously, 120s timeout).
Path: /webhook/generate-p2p-report
Responds via the 'Respond to Webhook' node at the end.

nodes.name: Call Groq API
nodes.notes:
n8n Cloud setup:
  Settings → Variables → Add:
    Name: GROQ_API_KEY
    Value: your key from https://console.groq.com/keys

Model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile (free tier, fast).
API is OpenAI-compatible — Bearer token in Authorization header.

n8n_cloud_variables.how_to_set: n8n Cloud → Settings → Variables → Add Variable

required.GROQ_API_KEY: Your Groq API key from https://console.groq.com/keys

_setup_guide.how_it_works: FastAPI POSTs the full run payload to the webhook synchronously (120s timeout). n8n calls Groq (llama-3.3-70b-versatile), extracts the Markdown report from choices[0].message.content, and returns it in the HTTP response. FastAPI passes it straight to the frontend.
